name: Oven Chicken Paprikash
recipeIngredient: 1 lb wide noodles, cooked according to package directions and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onions, garlic, and tomatoes in the bottom of a large roasting pan.
2. Season the chickens to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Place the chickens in the roasting pan, breast side up.
4. Sprinkle paprika over the chickens.
5. Pour chicken broth over the chickens.
6. Cover tightly with foil and roast at 325°F for 3.5-4 hours or until the meat is falling off the bone.
7. Remove the foil during the last hour of cooking to allow the chickens to brown.
8. When the chickens are done, remove large pieces of meat from breast bones and discard all bones.
9. Remove legs with thighs.
10. Stir sour cream into the remaining pan juices.
11. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
12. Stir in cooked and drained noodles.
13. Spoon onto a serving plate.
14. Slice the chicken breasts and arrange atop the noodles with chicken legs and thighs.
